case_title: GENE KWANG VS. THOMAS TAM et al

docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,200.00 FILED BY KWANG, GENE AS TO DEFENDANT TAM, THOMAS LI, JIM ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-04-2014 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-04-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-04-2014 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANTS (2) WERE PRESENT. PLAINTIFF WAS ASSISTED BY TAISHANESE INTERPRETER---AMY KUANG. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-04-2014 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KWANG, GENE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TAM, THOMAS LI, JIM $2,510.93 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,560.93 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT TAM, THOMAS LI, JIM
